overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a lush forest environment. The character traverses a wooden bridge as weather transitions from partly cloudy to light rain, then continues along a dirt path toward a tribal settlement with distinctive wooden archways.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with red flowering undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward wooden bridge in clear weather

entered.detail: rope and plank bridge structure spanning a stream ahead on the path
dense forest canopy with green foliage
vibrant magenta-red ground cover flowers lining the path
worn earth trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a lush forest with dense vegetation and vibrant red flowering bushes. A wooden rope bridge is visible ahead spanning a stream, with tall trees framing the path on both sides under partly cloudy skies.

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge structure, ground changes from dirt to wooden planks
rain begins to fall, weather transitions from clear to light rain

agents.ego_description: climbing onto and crossing the wooden bridge as rain begins to fall

entered.detail: thick rope handrails along the bridge sides
water visible beneath the bridge planks

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto a wooden rope bridge, transitioning from the dirt path to wooden planks. Rain begins to fall around the 13-second mark, changing the weather conditions. The bridge spans a stream below with rope railings visible on the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail alongside stream in rain

agents.ego_description: walking along forest path in steady rain, navigating around vegetation

entered.detail: flowing water alongside the dirt path
large decorative tribal arch structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the character continues along a dirt trail through the forest in light rain. A stream runs parallel on the right side, and a large wooden archway structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement entrance with ceremonial archway

events.description: character passes under large wooden ceremonial archway
tribal settlement huts become clearly visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under the large wooden archway toward the settlement

entered.detail: wooden stilt structure with thatched roof
clusters of white flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large wooden ceremonial archway that marks the entrance to a tribal settlement. After passing under the arch, wooden stilt huts become visible on the right side while white flowering plants line the path. The rain continues to fall as the character moves deeper into the settlement area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush forest that transitions from a bright, partly cloudy day into a rainy approach to a tribal settlement. It begins on a dirt trail flanked by dense vegetation and vibrant red flowering bushes, moving steadily toward a wooden rope bridge spanning a stream. As the character ascends onto the wooden planks, the weather shifts and light rain begins to fall, blurring the surrounding greenery. The scene then opens back onto a dirt path where a stream runs parallel to the trail, leading the camera toward a large wooden ceremonial archway in the distance. Finally, the movement passes under the arch and into the settlement, where wooden stilt huts and white flowering plants appear through the persisting rain.
